---
globs: packages/*/dist/**
---

# Generated Output — Do Not Edit Directly

Files under `dist/` are generated by wpts or tsc. Never edit them directly.

- Plugin PHP issues: fix in `src/` TypeScript or `packages/wpts/src/templates/` Handlebars, then rebuild
- Admin UI issues: fix in `packages/admin-ui/src/`, then rebuild
- Rebuild: `pnpm --filter <package> build`
- Commit updated `dist/` alongside source changes
- Use `/wp-plugin-review` skill for reviewing generated PHP output
